## Current Projects

I am actively working on several exciting initiatives:

- **[AI Git](https://github.com/kaiquekandykoga/ai_git)**: A project that leverages AI to manage Git repositories, automating and enhancing version control workflows through intelligent decision-making.

- **[Bitbucket MCP](https://github.com/kaiquekandykoga/bitbucket_mcp)**: An MCP server for Bitbucket, enabling seamless integration and communication with Bitbucket repositories through the Model Context Protocol.

- **Claude Code Skill (Work Project)**: Currently developing a Claude Code skill that interprets requirements directly from video recordings using ffmpeg and whisper. The skill automatically builds, tests, and fixes Playwright E2E tests in TypeScript, iterating until all tests pass.

## Hermes Agent Use Cases

I utilize Hermes Agent for automated backup purposes, retaining only the newest snapshots to optimize cloud storage space and maintain efficient backup management.
